description:
You are an Online Merchant using wger to track your fitness. Over the past month, due to connection issues at the gym, you accidentally created multiple 'empty' workout sessions (sessions containing 0 logged exercises) alongside your real workouts. Delete all empty workout sessions from the past 30 days while keeping all valid workout sessions (those containing exercise logs) intact.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: adminadmin

The wger application is accessible at http://localhost.
